ccel.title: NPNF2-08. Basil: Letters and Select Works

source.title: NPNF2-08. Basil: Letters and Select Works
NPNF2-08. Basil: Letters and Select Works

verses.text: Before you did write me a few words: now not even a few.
Your brevity will soon become silence.
Return to your old ways, and do not let me have to scold you for your laconic behaviour.
But I shall be glad even of a little letter in token of your great love.
